name: personal-os
description: AI Personal OS — Robin as Chief of Staff. A growing collection of skills from Bayram Annakov's 5-week course. Identity, knowledge, communications, research, and multi-agent skills land here as each workshop ships. Built on Engelbart's H-LAM/T framework and the agentskills.io open standard.

interface.shortDescription: Robin as your Chief of Staff — skills from Bayram Annakov's 5-week course.
interface.longDescription: A growing skill bundle from the AI Personal OS course. Currently ships /init-robin and /finish-robin (Workshop 1 identity skills). New skills land here as each workshop ships.
interface.defaultPrompt: Run /init-robin to set Robin up from my AI conversation history, or /finish-robin to declare goals and achievements.
